question: How many total orders are in the database?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders

question: How many customers are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_customers FROM customers

question: How many restaurants are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_restaurants FROM restaurants

question: List all distinct cuisine types
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT cuisine_type FROM restaurants ORDER BY cuisine_type

question: List all distinct payment methods
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT method FROM payments ORDER BY method

question: How many delivered orders are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivered_orders FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered'

question: How many cancelled orders are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cancelled_orders FROM orders WHERE status = 'cancelled'

question: What is the total revenue from all delivered orders?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered'

question: What is the average order value?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered'

question: How many riders are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_riders FROM riders

question: What is the average restaurant rating?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM restaurants

question: How many menu items are there in total?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_menu_items FROM menu_items

question: What are the vehicle types used by riders?
gold_sql: SELECT vehicle_type, COUNT(*) AS rider_count FROM riders GROUP BY vehicle_type ORDER BY rider_count DESC

question: How many promotions are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_promotions FROM promotions

question: What is the order status breakdown?
gold_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: How many restaurants are there per cuisine type?
gold_sql: SELECT cuisine_type, COUNT(*) AS restaurant_count FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine_type ORDER BY restaurant_count DESC

question: How many orders used a promotion?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS promo_orders FROM orders WHERE promo_id IS NOT NULL

question: What is the average number of items per order?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(item_count) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS item_count FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id)

question: What is the average food rating?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(food_rating) AS avg_food_rating FROM ratings

question: What is the average delivery rating?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(delivery_rating) AS avg_delivery_rating FROM ratings

question: Show monthly revenue for the last 6 months
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_time) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered' AND order_time >= date('now', '-6 months') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC

question: Top 5 restaurants by number of orders
gold_sql: SELECT r.name AS restaurant_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.id GROUP BY r.id ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: Split of payment methods
gold_sql: SELECT method AS payment_method, COUNT(*) AS count FROM payments GROUP BY method ORDER BY count DESC

question: Average delivery time by zone for delivered orders
gold_sql: SELECT dz.zone_name AS zone, ROUND(AVG((julianday(o.delivered_time) - julianday(o.order_time)) * 24 * 60), 1) AS avg_delivery_minutes FROM orders o JOIN riders r ON o.rider_id = r.id JOIN delivery_zones dz ON r.zone_id = dz.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY dz.id ORDER BY avg_delivery_minutes DESC

question: Which cuisine type has the highest average rating?
gold_sql: SELECT cuisine_type, ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine_type ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many orders were placed each day of the week?
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%w', order_time) AS day_of_week, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY day_of_week ORDER BY day_of_week

question: What is the total revenue per cuisine type?
gold_sql: SELECT r.cuisine_type, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY r.cuisine_type ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: Top 5 customers by total spending
gold_sql: SELECT c.name AS customer_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5

question: Number of orders per zone
gold_sql: SELECT dz.zone_name AS zone, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN delivery_zones dz ON c.zone_id = dz.id GROUP BY dz.id ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: What percentage of orders are cancelled?
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS cancellation_rate FROM orders

question: Show weekly order count for the last 3 months
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%W', order_time) AS week, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE order_time >= date('now', '-3 months') GROUP BY week ORDER BY week ASC

question: What is the revenue breakdown by payment method?
gold_sql: SELECT p.method AS payment_method, SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue FROM payments p WHERE p.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.method ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: Top 5 most ordered menu items
gold_sql: SELECT mi.name AS item_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_ordered FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.menu_item_id = mi.id GROUP BY mi.id ORDER BY total_ordered DESC LIMIT 5

question: Average order value by cuisine type
gold_sql: SELECT r.cuisine_type, ROUND(AVG(o.total_amount), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY r.cuisine_type ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

question: How many riders use each vehicle type?
gold_sql: SELECT vehicle_type, COUNT(*) AS rider_count FROM riders GROUP BY vehicle_type ORDER BY rider_count DESC

question: What is the average food and delivery rating by cuisine?
gold_sql: SELECT r.cuisine_type, ROUND(AVG(rt.food_rating), 2) AS avg_food_rating, ROUND(AVG(rt.delivery_rating), 2) AS avg_delivery_rating FROM ratings rt JOIN orders o ON rt.order_id = o.id JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.id GROUP BY r.cuisine_type ORDER BY avg_food_rating DESC

question: Show the trend of cancelled orders by month
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS cancelled_orders FROM orders WHERE status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC

question: Which zones have the most restaurants?
gold_sql: SELECT dz.zone_name AS zone, COUNT(r.id) AS restaurant_count FROM restaurants r JOIN delivery_zones dz ON r.zone_id = dz.id GROUP BY dz.id ORDER BY restaurant_count DESC

question: What is the average discount percentage across all promotions?
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(discount_pct), 2) AS avg_discount FROM promotions

question: How many orders per hour of day?
gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%H', order_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour ASC

question: What is the average delivery time in minutes for each zone, only for delivered orders, sorted slowest first?
gold_sql: SELECT dz.zone_name AS zone, ROUND(AVG((julianday(o.delivered_time) - julianday(o.order_time)) * 24 * 60), 1) AS avg_delivery_minutes FROM orders o JOIN riders r ON o.rider_id = r.id JOIN delivery_zones dz ON r.zone_id = dz.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY dz.id ORDER BY avg_delivery_minutes DESC

question: Which restaurant had the highest revenue last month?
gold_sql: SELECT r.name AS restaurant_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN restaurants r ON o.restaurant_id = r.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_time) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 month')) GROUP BY r.id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: For each zone, what fraction of orders were delivered vs cancelled?
gold_sql: SELECT dz.zone_name AS zone, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status='delivered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivered, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id=c.id JOIN delivery_zones dz ON c.zone_id=dz.id GROUP BY dz.id ORDER BY delivered DESC

question: Show the top 3 menu items by revenue for Biryani restaurants
gold_sql: SELECT mi.name AS item_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.item_price) AS item_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.menu_item_id = mi.id JOIN restaurants r ON mi.restaurant_id = r.id WHERE r.cuisine_type = 'Biryani' GROUP BY mi.id ORDER BY item_revenue DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the retention rate: customers who ordered in both the first and second half of 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS retained_customers FROM (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE order_time BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-06-30' GROUP BY customer_id) h1 JOIN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE order_time BETWEEN '2025-07-01' AND '2025-12-31' GROUP BY customer_id) h2 ON h1.customer_id = h2.customer_id

question: Which riders have the highest average delivery speed (shortest average delivery time) with at least 50 deliveries?
gold_sql: SELECT r.name AS rider_name, COUNT(o.id) AS delivery_count, ROUND(AVG((julianday(o.delivered_time) - julianday(o.order_time)) * 24 * 60), 1) AS avg_minutes FROM orders o JOIN riders r ON o.rider_id = r.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY r.id HAVING delivery_count >= 50 ORDER BY avg_minutes ASC LIMIT 10

question: What is the month-over-month revenue growth rate for the last 6 months?
gold_sql: SELECT month, total_revenue, ROUND(100.0*(total_revenue - LAG(total_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month)) / LAG(total_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) AS growth_pct FROM (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_time) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status='delivered' AND order_time >= date('now','-6 months') GROUP BY month) ORDER BY month ASC

question: For each cuisine type, what is the average number of orders per restaurant?
gold_sql: SELECT r.cuisine_type, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(o.id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT r.id), 1) AS avg_orders_per_restaurant FROM restaurants r LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.id = o.restaurant_id GROUP BY r.cuisine_type ORDER BY avg_orders_per_restaurant DESC

question: Which delivery zone has the highest cancellation rate?
gold_sql: SELECT dz.zone_name AS zone, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN o.status='cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS cancellation_rate FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id=c.id JOIN delivery_zones dz ON c.zone_id=dz.id GROUP BY dz.id ORDER BY cancellation_rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average basket size (total items) for orders that used a promotion vs those that did not?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN o.promo_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'With Promo' ELSE 'No Promo' END AS promo_used, ROUND(AVG(item_total), 2) AS avg_basket_size FROM orders o JOIN (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS item_total FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id) oi ON o.id = oi.order_id GROUP BY promo_used
